content: node --experimental-test-coverage with ESM: Coverage is collected via V8 coverage (NODE_V8_COVERAGE). Works on Node 18.8+ but is Stability 1 (Experimental) through Node 22. Key pitfalls: (1) Coverage includes test/ helper files (helpers.mjs appears in output) and src/ modules — need --test-coverage-exclude to filter; (2) lcov reporter requires --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=lcov.info alongside another reporter (lcov emits NO test results itself, CI appears to pass silently with zero output); (3) --experimental-test-coverage does NOT enforce thresholds by itself — use --test-coverage-lines, --test-coverage-branches, --test-coverage-functions flags (Node 22+) or the process exits 0 even at 0% coverage; (4) ESM source maps: coverage line numbers may be off for transpiled/bundled code but agentmap.mjs is not transpiled so this is not a concern here; (5) On Node 18, threshold flags do not exist — coverage is report-only.
